title: G.S.R. 107(E): Water (Prevention und Control of Pollution) Second Amendment Rules, 1992

D.L.-33004/92 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 76] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 18, 1992/MAGHA 29, 1913 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation 4 6 4 G I / 9 2 (1) -- 1 of 3 -- "2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th February, 1992 G.S.R. 107(E).—In exercise of the powers con- ferred by Section 63 of the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974 (6 of 1974) the Cen- tral Government, in consultation with the Central Pollution Control Board, hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution ) F.ules, 1975, namely:— 1.(1) These rules may be called the Water (Preven- tion and Control or" Pollution) Amendment Rules, 1992. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2.
